OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols may occupy 3 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, some symbols with a wind chime (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) that occupy 3 symbols' spaces may appear in reels 2, 3 and/or 4.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: After wins are paid, the first symbol with a wind chime that is involved in a win in the previous round will activate the x2 multiplier.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: Every other subsequent symbol with a wind chime that is involved in a win in the previous round will double the multiplier.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: At the start of every free spin, the multiplier is x8.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: After wins are paid, every symbol with a wind chime that is involved in a win in the previous round will double the multiplier.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
OishiDelightsPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

OishiDelightsRule.Rule1_1: Oishi Delights is a 5-reels, 8-rows video slot featuring multipliers up to x%{1024}.
OishiDelightsRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{64} ways - %{32768} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
OishiDelightsRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
